meaning: adj.轻快的,俏皮的,潇洒的,放荡的
examples: He was wearing his hat at a rakish Angle.
The rakish actor was known for dating models.
He looked as if he had glued the rakish beard on to his solemn face.
But many will give Kim K. more respect now for her rakish brand of capitalism.
My first stop, Nike.com, ushers me to a rakish-looking pair called Air Deschutz VIII.
